ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product sold */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sold */,
  "product_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount from the transaction */,
  "pack_size" INTEGER /* Pack size of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "lifestyle" TEXT /* Customer lifestyle segment */,
  "premium_customer" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer is a premium customer */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "net_total" REAL /* Net total amount after applying discounts and taxes */,
  "loyalty_points_earned" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned from the transaction */,
  "loyalty_points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Loyalty points redeemed during the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "total_loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Total loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "store_state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "store_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "pack_size" INTEGER /* Pack size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_card_number" INTEGER /* Loyalty card number of the customer */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "total_loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Total loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "tiers" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
